## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about. Why is the proposed one better? -->

## Scope check

A few honest questions to help us evaluate:

- Is this a one-off for your use case, or do you think other users hit the same wall?
- Could it live in a separate adapter package rather than the core SDK?
- What's the rough effort to maintain it long-term (new APIs need new tests, docs, support)?

<!-- Links, related issues, prior art, anything else useful. -->
